data.body:
## Description

Append 3 test functions to `tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py`:
1. `test_tdd_reviewer_bidirectional_dimension` — tdd.md contains a dimension for bidirectional test coverage (modify/remove/create)
2. `test_tdd_reviewer_scoring_modify_remove` — tdd.md scoring criteria mention modify-test and remove-test tasks
3. `test_tdd_reviewer_below_4_missing_bidirectional` — tdd.md "below 4" criteria describe what a plan looks like when it lacks modify/remove test tasks for changed/deleted behavior

TDD: RED — tdd.md doesn't yet contain bidirectional dimension. Structural content tests justified under metadata/schema validation — reviewer dimensions are normative scoring vocabulary.

### .test-index entry
Existing entry maps `tdd.md` to `test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py`. Add RED marker to existing line: `[test_tdd_reviewer_bidirectional_dimension]`

### File Impact
- Edit: `tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py`
- Edit: `.test-index` (add RED marker to existing tdd.md entry)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] test_tdd_reviewer_bidirectional_dimension exists
  Verify: grep -q "def test_tdd_reviewer_bidirectional_dimension" tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py
- [ ] test_tdd_reviewer_scoring_modify_remove exists
  Verify: grep -q "def test_tdd_reviewer_scoring_modify_remove" tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py
- [ ] test_tdd_reviewer_below_4_missing_bidirectional exists
  Verify: grep -q "def test_tdd_reviewer_below_4_missing_bidirectional" tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py
- [ ] Valid Python
  Verify: python3 -m py_compile tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py
- [ ] Tests fail (RED)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py -k "bidirectional or modify_remove or below_4_missing" --tb=no -q 2>&1 | grep -c FAILED | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker on existing tdd.md entry
  Verify: grep -q 'tdd.md.*test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py.*\[test_tdd_reviewer_bidirectional_dimension\]' .test-index
